description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Check Markdown for Broken Links that checks for broken links in Markdown files. The workflow should trigger on push to master branch for Markdown files, on pull requests to master for Markdown files, on a scheduled cron job, and allow manual dispatch. In an ubuntu-latest job, check out the code, set up Node.js 16, and run Linkinator to scan Markdown files for broken links, excluding certain URLs and directories.
